sections.paragraph:
λαμπρός, ά, όν [λάμπω] ‘possessing brightness’

—a. of clothing elegant Lk 23:11; Ac 10:30; Js 2:2f; Rv 15:6; 19:8.

—b. of water sparkling Rv 22:1.

—c. of the planet Venus bright Rv 22:16.

—d. as a collective, in ext. sense of someth. luxurious πάντα τὰ λιπαρὰ ϰαὶ τὰ λαμπρά all your splendid and stylish stuff is gone Rv 18:14.
